author: codex-agent

patch.value: Feature scope: background start/list/status/logs/stop/resume for linked-test execution with deterministic run identity and runtime metadata.
Background linked-test orchestration and run management
Add opt-in background execution for pm test surfaces with lifecycle commands and duplicate-run prevention.
pm test --run and pm test-all support background mode; run registry exposes list/status/logs/stop/resume; duplicate active runs are prevented by fingerprint.
Run pm test --run with long command and require detached lifecycle control.
Background runs are manageable without duplicate execution.
Enables agents to keep progressing while tests run asynchronously.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search background linked test management --limit 20 --json + list-open/list-in-progress scans show no active command surface for lifecycle-managed background test runs.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Owns run registry,fingerprint dedupe,process lifecycle controls,and status/log visibility.
